texto: Whenever people talk in the abstract about the pros and cons of immigration, one should not forget that immigrants are individual human beings whose lives happen not to fit neatly within national borders – and that like all human beings, they are all different.How different, though? Different better, or different worse? Such basic questions underlie whether people are willing to accept outsiders in their midst
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Philippe Legrain: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Whenever people talk in the abstract about the pros and cons of immigration, one should not forge…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, country, immigrants pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de immigrants e immigration.
